offline.title: No connection
offline.message: Check your internet connection and try again.

session.conflictMessage: Your account is active on another device. Would you like to use it here?

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.driveUnavailable: Google Drive is unavailable. Check the app permissions.
errors.refreshToken: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.freeDescription: Get access to all premium features for €5 per month.

pastDue.message: There is a problem with your payment. Update your payment method to keep your access.

monthly.standardSubject: Autonomas — Are your invoices up to date?
monthly.reminderBody: Remember to review your invoices and log last month's expenses. Keeping your books up to date saves hours before each quarterly deadline.
monthly.deadlineBody: The {label} deadline is {date}. You have {days} days left to file.
monthly.confirmationBody: You will no longer receive monthly reminders from Autonomas.
monthly.errorHeading: This link has expired or is invalid.
monthly.errorBody: If you'd like to unsubscribe, email us at {email} and we'll handle it manually.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.emptySubtitle: Scan a receipt or add an expense manually
expenses.captureHint: Point the camera at your receipt
expenses.freeOnlyManual: Manual entry is available for free. Upgrade to scan receipts.
expenses.errorPreprocessing: Could not process the image. Please try again.
expenses.errorOcr: Could not read the receipt. Try again or enter the details manually.
expenses.ticketSimplificadoNote: Simplified receipt: the vendor's tax ID may not appear. Confirm deductibility with your accountant.
expenses.vehicleDeductibilityWarning: Vehicle expenses are only partially deductible for most freelancers (50%). Check with your accountant.
expenses.saveFailed: Could not save the expense. Please try again.
expenses.deleteFailed: Could not delete the expense. Please try again.

step1.title: Choose your language
step1.subtitle: You can change this later in settings

step2.title: Connect your Google account
step2.subtitle: Autonomas needs access to Google Drive and Google Calendar to work
step2.driveExplain: We securely save your invoices and expenses in your own Google Drive. Nobody else has access.
step2.calendarExplain: We sync your appointments with Google Calendar so you're always up to date.
step2.driveError: We need Google Drive access to save your invoices.

step3.title: Tell us about your activity
step3.subtitle: This allows us to calculate your taxes correctly
step3.irpf15Description: For freelancers with more than 3 years of activity
step3.irpf7Description: For the first 3 years of activity
step3.irpfTooltipBody: The reduced 7% rate is available to freelancers registering for the first time, or who have not been active in the last 2 years. It applies for the first 3 years.

error.title: We couldn't set up your space
error.drivePermission: Check that you have granted Google Drive access.
